message:
chore: audit batches 381-382 — 18 files (~5,634L), all SOUND

Explored trace buffer/format/compression pipeline, capability system (cx/cap),
observability (entry/context/collector), policy types, signal handling,
transport channel, io_uring shim, event structure, distributed collector,
h2 error codes, and transport errors. No bugs found.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
